subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the Best-Beloved of all worlds, that thou hast quaffed from the most pure wine and gazed upon the Most Great Vision - such is this station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد محبوب عالمیان را که از رحیق اطهر آشامیدی و بمنظر اکبر ناظری این مقامی است
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
